room_description: Una catedral en ruinas cuya boveda se pierde en la penumbra. Vitrales rotos dejan entrar haces de luz coloreada. El eco de cada paso retumba entre los pilares.

floor.texture_prompt: grand cathedral marble floor, black and white checkered pattern, cracked, dusty, seamless tiling

ceiling.texture_prompt: ruined gothic cathedral vaulted ceiling, painted fresco faded and peeling, ribbed stone arches, dark, seamless tiling

walls.texture_prompt: gothic cathedral wall, ruined stained glass window, stone tracery, dark, seamless tiling
cathedral stone wall, pointed arch alcoves, crumbling statues in niches, seamless tiling
cathedral entrance wall, massive wooden double doors, iron hinges, stone archway, seamless tiling
cathedral wall, collapsed section revealing sky, rubble and vines, seamless tiling

exits.description: escaleras hacia la cripta bajo el altar

objects.texture_prompt: massive gothic stone pillar, carved capitals, dark cathedral
objects.description: pilar gotico masivo con capiteles tallados

objects.texture_prompt: gothic stone pillar, cracked and leaning, cathedral
gothic stone pillar, moss and vine covered, cathedral ruins
objects.description: pilar cubierto de musgo y enredaderas

objects.texture_prompt: gothic stone pillar, intact, cathedral interior
objects.description: pilar intacto, el unico sin danar

objects.model_prompt: gothic cathedral stone altar with carved crosses and candles, dark fantasy, ruined
objects.texture_prompt: carved stone altar, religious reliefs, candle wax, dark
objects.description: altar de piedra tallada con cruces y restos de velas

objects.description: banco de iglesia de madera oscura, parcialmente roto

pile of stone rubble, broken masonry, cathedral debris
objects.description: monton de escombros donde colapso parte del muro

objects.description: vidriera gotica con escena de angel en cristal coloreado

npcs.name: Hermana Mara
npcs.model_prompt: kneeling nun priestess in tattered white robes, praying pose, dark gothic fantasy character
npcs.sprite_prompt: kneeling nun priestess, tattered white robes, praying hands, blood on forehead, dark gothic fantasy, pixel art
npcs.description: monja arrodillada frente al altar, susurrando oraciones con las manos ensangrentadas
npcs.dialogue_hint: Fue testigo de la profanacion. Sabe que la catedral fue atacada por cultistas.

npcs.name: Sir Aldric
npcs.model_prompt: wounded medieval knight in dented plate armor, sitting pose, bandaged arm, dark fantasy character
npcs.sprite_prompt: wounded knight sitting against pillar, dented plate armor, bandaged arm, tired face, dark fantasy, pixel art
npcs.description: caballero herido apoyado contra un pilar, con armadura abollada y brazo vendado
npcs.dialogue_hint: Sobrevivio al ataque. Puede unirse como aliado temporal.

ambient_event: El viento silba a traves de los vitrales rotos. Fragmentos de piedra caen de vez en cuando del techo.
